result.stdout:
Description:
  dotnet tool for generating jwt tokens for the Phoesion.DevJwt library

Usage:
  Phoesion.DevJwt.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  create <aud>          Create a new jwt token.
  encode-key <signkey>  Encode a key to Base64 to be used in application settings.

commands.payload:
Description:
  dotnet tool for generating jwt tokens for the Phoesion.DevJwt library

Usage:
  Phoesion.DevJwt.CLI [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  create <aud>          Create a new jwt token.
  encode-key <signkey>  Encode a key to Base64 to be used in application settings.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Create a new jwt token.

Usage:
  Phoesion.DevJwt.CLI create <aud> [options]

Arguments:
  <aud>  The 'aud' (audience) claim for the token.

Options:
  --issuer        Add claim for issuer (iss) type.
  --sub           Add claim for 'sub' (subject) type.
  --email         Add claim for 'sub' (subject) type.
  --scope         Add 'scope' claim.
  --role          Add 'role' claim.
  --claim         Add claims to the JWT. (in the format "name=value")
  --duration      Set duration (in days) for the token. ( expiration date = utc.now + duration )
  --audience      Add more audience values to the 'aud' claim
  --signkey       Use custom key to sign the jwt.
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Create a new jwt token.

Usage:
  Phoesion.DevJwt.CLI create <aud> [options]

Arguments:
  <aud>  The 'aud' (audience) claim for the token.

Options:
  --issuer        Add claim for issuer (iss) type.
  --sub           Add claim for 'sub' (subject) type.
  --email         Add claim for 'sub' (subject) type.
  --scope         Add 'scope' claim.
  --role          Add 'role' claim.
  --claim         Add claims to the JWT. (in the format "name=value")
  --duration      Set duration (in days) for the token. ( expiration date = utc.now + duration )
  --audience      Add more audience values to the 'aud' claim
  --signkey       Use custom key to sign the jwt.
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Usage:

Arguments:
  <signkey>  Use custom key used sign the jwt.

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
